summary: Final pre-deployment testing completed for Gym City Pescara - All core functionality working perfectly with excellent backend performance (85% pass rate) and 100% frontend functionality
passed_tests: Admin dashboard displays user list with 8 users and statistics
Create user dialog opens with all required fields (name, email, password, phone, role, subscription)
Calendar displays weekly course schedule with proper Italian interface
Course booking system correctly handles subscription expiry (Mario Rossi expired)
Login page does NOT show demo credentials (requirement fulfilled)
Day navigation working between Lunedì, Martedì, Mercoledì, Giovedì, Venerdì
Backend APIs 85% success rate (17/20 tests passed)
JWT authentication working for all 3 roles (admin/user/instructor)
Professional gym branding with Italian language throughout
Responsive design working on desktop viewport
success_percentage: Backend: 85% (17/20 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all features functional)
